creator: predius@netzero.net
text:
After some heavy mucking, I was able to use a 4.1 install to fetch -STABLE
from 11/7 and compile that.  As long as I leave the pccard code out, it runs
fine.  As soon as I link the pccard code into the kernel, I get the exact
same behavior as before with the GENERIC kernel.

Joshua Coombs
